commands.review_summary:
The PR records SHA-256 hashes for ClawHub skill installs, adds verifier helpers, surfaces missing or mismatched hashes in security audit, and adds a proposal document.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defects: PR-head source inspection shows verifier error results are ignored and dot-prefixed contents are excluded from the digest used by verification. I did not run a mutating install/audit repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer/security review rather than an automated repair because contributor real behavior proof is missing and the remaining trust-model decisions are broader than a narrow code fix.
